issue_title: Bahn integration depricated due to HTML scraping, switch to other API
issue_body:
### The problem

Due to the HTML scraping of the bahn.de website, the integration is marked for removal in 2022.11. Switching to an API has been suggested before in https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/12773 without success. The used package `schiene` still relies on HTML scraping, but there are other projects now which could fill the gap, e.g.:

- https://github.com/public-transport/hafas-client
- https://github.com/marudor/BahnhofsAbfahrten

Is this integration still being maintained so the removal in 2022.11 could be averted? 

### What version of Home Assistant Core has the issue?

2022.09

### What was the last working version of Home Assistant Core?

2022.08

### What type of installation are you running?

Home Assistant Container

### Integration causing the issue

Deutsche Bahn

### Link to integration documentation on our website

https://www.home-assistant.io/integrations/deutsche_bahn/

### Diagnostics information

_No response_

### Example YAML snippet

_No response_

### Anything in the logs that might be useful for us?

_No response_

### Additional information

_No response_
pr_body:
<!--
  You are amazing! Thanks for contributing to our project!
  Please, DO NOT DELETE ANY TEXT from this template! (unless instructed).
-->
## Proposed change
<!--
  Describe the big picture of your changes here to communicate to the
  maintainers why we should accept this pull request. If it fixes a bug
  or resolves a feature request, be sure to link to that issue in the
  additional information section.
-->
As the `Deutsche Bahn` integration is being deprecated, I created a new integration based on the [pyhafas](https://github.com/FahrplanDatenGarten/pyhafas) client.
pyhafas uses the HaFAS API Endpoint and therefore does not use any web scraping.

This integration is based on the deprecated `Deutsche Bahn` integation and is almost backwards compatible to it.

The is also an open issue https://github.com/home-assistant/core/issues/78233 already opened. With another person showing interest of this integration.

This is my rewrite of the integration to use control flows see https://github.com/home-assistant/core/pull/78260.
